caption: In the video, two men are seated side by side in what appears to be a cozy living room setting. The man on the left, Rick Segall, is wearing a dark green t-shirt and has short gray hair. He is animatedly speaking and gestures with his right hand, bringing it up to his face as if emphasizing a point. The man on the right, Korbin Miles, is dressed in a light blue t-shirt and has a beard along with tattoos on his arm. He is smiling and looking towards Rick, seemingly engaged in the conversation. Behind them, a television screen displays the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" in bright yellow letters, suggesting that they might be reacting to something humorous or entertaining. A shelf filled with DVDs and other items adds to the casual and relaxed atmosphere of the scene. The overall mood seems lighthearted and friendly, with both individuals clearly enjoying their interaction.
